'''sakozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thallation|thallation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thallation|thallation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sakozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sækezheth|sækezheth]] || [[word:sækezhej|sækezhej]] || [[word:sækezhesh|sækezhesh]] || [[word:sækezhe|sækezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakokozhoth|sakokozhoth]] || [[word:sakokozhoj|sakokozhoj]] || [[word:sakokozhosh|sakokozhosh]] || [[word:sakokozho|sakokozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakozhoth|sakozhoth]] || [[word:sakozhoj|sakozhoj]] || [[word:sakozhosh|sakozhosh]] || [[word:sakozho|sakozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakofzhoth|sakofzhoth]] || [[word:sakofzhoj|sakofzhoj]] || [[word:sakofzhosh|sakofzhosh]] || [[word:sakofzhof|sakofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sakozhotho|sakozhotho]] || [[word:sakozhojo|sakozhojo]] || [[word:sakozhosho|sakozhosho]] || [[word:sakozhoko|sakozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sakozhoth|sakozhoth]] || [[word:sakozhoj|sakozhoj]] || [[word:sakozhosh|sakozhosh]] || [[word:sakozho|sakozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sakozhothol|sakozhothol]] || [[word:sakozhojol|sakozhojol]] || [[word:sakozhoshol|sakozhoshol]] || [[word:sakozhokol|sakozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sakozhothotho|sakozhothotho]] || [[word:sakozhojojo|sakozhojojo]] || [[word:sakozhoshosho|sakozhoshosho]] || [[word:sakozhoko|sakozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sakozhothon|sakozhothon]] || [[word:sakozhojon|sakozhojon]] || [[word:sakozhoshon|sakozhoshon]] || [[word:sakozhokon|sakozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sakozhothoro|sakozhothoro]] || [[word:sakozhojoro|sakozhojoro]] || [[word:sakozhoshoro|sakozhoshoro]] || [[word:sakozhokoro|sakozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
